description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with lint, tests and coverage stages. Add a flake8 job in the lint stage that uses the python:3.6 image, caches .cache, runs pip install flake8 in before_script and executes flake8 --count --statistics odoo_rpc_client. Add test jobs named tests-py2.7, tests-py3.5, tests-py3.6, tests-py3.7, tests-py3.8, tests-py3.9 and tests-py3.10, each running in the tests stage with the corresponding python:<version> image, sharing a before_script that installs -r requirements.txt -r requirements-test.txt, a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME on .cache, variables ODOO_TEST_SUPER_PASSWORD=admin and PIP_CACHE_DIR=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache, and services odoo10‑odoo15 using the specified registry images; each runs ODOO_TEST_HOST=odooX ODOO_TEST_PROTOCOL="xml-rpc" coverage run -p setup.py test and ODOO_TEST_HOST=odooX ODOO_TEST_PROTOCOL="json-rpc" coverage run -p setup.py test for versions 10‑15, then coverage combine and coverage report --fail-under=90, moves the .coverage file to .coverage_${CI_JOB_NAME} in after_script, and publishes an artifact named coverage_${CI_JOB_NAME} containing .coverage_${CI_JOB_NAME} for 1 day. Add a coverage job in the coverage stage using python:3.7, installs coverage in before_script, combines all .coverage_tests‑* files with coverage combine, runs coverage report --fail-under=90, generates HTML with coverage html in after_script, and stores the htmlcov directory as a 14‑day artifact. No special rules or deployment targets are defined.
